input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule D.13.2.6 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: d.13.2.6
            TITLE: for electric vehicles (ev):

            CONTENT:
            rule D.13.2.6: For Electric Vehicles (EV):
D.13.2.6 For Electric Vehicles (EV):  
a. Energy Meter data must be downloaded to measure energy used and check for 
Violations EV.3.3 
b. Penalties will be applied per EV.3.5 and/or D.13.3.4
Formula SAE® Rules 2024 © 2023 SAE International  Page 139 of 140   
Version 1.0   1 Sep 2023

final_answer: For Electric Vehicles (EV): D.13.2.6 For Electric Vehicles (EV): a. Energy Meter data must be downloaded to measure energy used and check for Violations EV.3.3 b. Penalties will be applied per EV.3.5 and/or D.13.3.4
